external_services.service_name: Application for Accreditation as Suppliers of the Pasalubong Center
external_services.image: /assets/document_background/Application for Accreditation as Suppliers of the Pasalubong Center
external_services.type_of_transaction: G2C – Government to Citizens, G2B – Government to Business
external_services.who_may_avail: Cooperatives, Micro, small and medium enterprises (MSMEs)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Properly filled-up application form – 1 original copy

steps.client_step: 1. Submit properly filled-up application form to the Lipa City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive and approve the application
steps.person_responsible: City Cooperatives Officer (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Present the list of products
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive and file the submitted list of products
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Fill-out the Consignment Agreement Form
steps.agency_action: 3. Receive and file the Consignment Agreement Form
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist / Administrative Aide II (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Endorse the products to be displayed/ sold at the Pasalubong Center
steps.agency_action: 4. Accept the products to be displayed/ sold
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: General Assembly Resolution stating the cooperative’s intent to borrow, amount to be borrowed, project purpose and duly authorized signatories
Certificate of Registration, Articles of Cooperation and By-Laws
Updated list of members with addresses, subscribed capital and paid-in capital
Latest audited financial statements by a COA and CDA accredited external auditor
Recent Interim Financial Statements, at least 2 months old
List of BODs, Officers and Committee members with trainings attended
Cooperative policies, interviews and actual validation of account officers
Information sheets of BODs, Treasurer, Secretary, Manager and Bookkeeper

checklist_of_requirements.source: Applicant cooperative and Lipa City Cooperatives Office
Applicant cooperative and Lipa City Cooperatives Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Latest Cooperative Annual Progress Report Information System (CAPRIS) stamped “RECEIVED” by CDA
Latest Income Tax Return stamped “RECORDED” by BIR
Minutes of the last GA Meeting with election returns
List of business activities of the cooperative certified by the Chairperson
Work and Financial Plan and sources and detailed proponent equity participation in the project
Sworn affidavit of the Secretary regarding relationship to officials

steps.client_step: 1. Submit approved BOD/GA Resolution
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive approved BOD/ GA Resolution for approval of loan application from the applicant
steps.person_responsible: City Mayor (Lipa City Mayor’s Office) / City Cooperatives Officer (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.1. Receive loan application and other requirements from the applicant
steps.person_responsible: Senior Cooperative Development Specialist / CDS I / Project Development Assistant / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.2. Perform initial evaluation of submitted documents
steps.person_responsible: Senior Cooperative Development Specialist / CDS I / Project Development Assistant / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.3. Conduct background and credit investigation at banks, financial institutions and respective cooperatives
steps.person_responsible: Senior Cooperative Development Specialist / CDS I / Project Development Assistant / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.4. Assist in the preparation of project proposal and other required documents
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.5. Review, evaluate and recommend for approval of the City Cooperatives Officer
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.6. Endorse the project proposal to the City Administrator for recommendation to the City Mayor
steps.person_responsible: City Cooperatives Officer (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.7. Prepare pre-release documents such as promissory notes and deed of assignment
steps.person_responsible: Senior Cooperative Development Specialist / CDS I / Project Development Assistant / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.8. Prepare work program, obligation of allotment and voucher
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist / Administrative Assistant II / Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.9. Prepare and submit voucher to the Lipa City Cooperatives Office for check preparation
steps.person_responsible: Supervising Cooperative Development Specialist / Administrative Assistant II / Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.10. Process loan application
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Assistant II / Administrative Aide IV / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.11. Endorse check to City Accountant for preparation of advice
steps.person_responsible: Administrative Aide IV (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 2. File loan application and submit requirements at the City Cooperatives Office
steps.agency_action: 2.12. Explanation of undertaking and loan payment schedule
steps.person_responsible: City Cooperatives Officer (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Claim the check that will be awarded
steps.agency_action: 3. Award the check to the cooperative
steps.person_responsible: City Cooperatives Officer (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit confirmation slip and participation form
steps.agency_action: 1. Collect confirmation slips and participation forms
steps.person_responsible: Senior Cooperative Development Specialist / CDS I / Project Development Assistant / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Participate in different activities
steps.agency_action: 2. Facilitate the conduct of various activities to celebrate Cooperative Month
steps.person_responsible: Supervising CDS / Senior CDS / CDS I / Project Development Assistant / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

external_services.service_name: Request for Technical Support Services through the Packaging Center

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the accomplished technical service request form indicating the kind of needed service
steps.agency_action: 1.1. Accept the request form and the products. Explain the service/s requested
steps.person_responsible: Project Development Assistant (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the accomplished technical service request form indicating the kind of needed service
steps.agency_action: 1.2. Provide the needed services
steps.person_responsible: Supervising CDS / Senior CDS / CDS I / Project Development Assistant / Administrative Aide III (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 1. Submit the accomplished technical service request form indicating the kind of needed service

steps.person_responsible: Supervising CDS / Project Development Assistant (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office

steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

external_services.service_name: Application to Avail Local Investment Incentives
external_services.who_may_avail: New and existing enterprises whose business activities are included in the IPAs

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Properly filled-up application form, Business Name Registration, Audited Financial Statements
checklist_of_requirements.source: DTI / BIR / Lipa City Cooperatives Office

checklist_of_requirements.requirement: Articles of Partnership/Incorporation, Certificate of Registration, ECC/Non-Compliance Clearance

steps.client_step: 1. File and submit application form and other documentary requirements
steps.agency_action: 1. Receive and pre-assess the submitted documents
steps.person_responsible: Designated LEDIPO (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 1. File and submit application form and other documentary requirements
steps.agency_action: 2. Register the application on the Registration Logbook
steps.person_responsible: Designated LEDIPO (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 1. File and submit application form and other documentary requirements
steps.agency_action: 3. Issue Order of Payment for payment of filing fee
steps.person_responsible: Designated LEDIPO (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 2. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the Lipa City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 2. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the LEDIPO
steps.agency_action: 3.1. Conduct ocular inspection at the business premises
steps.person_responsible: Designated LEDIPO (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the LEDIPO
steps.agency_action: 3.2. Prepare evaluation report and submit to the LEDIP Board for action
steps.person_responsible: Designated LEDIPO (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 3. Present the Official Receipt to the LEDIPO
steps.agency_action: 3.4. Issue Order of Payment for approved application
steps.person_responsible: Designated LEDIPO (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 4.1. Receive payment and issue Official Receipt
steps.person_responsible: Revenue Collection Clerk II (Lipa City Treasurer’s Office)

steps.client_step: 4. Present the Order of Payment and pay the corresponding fee at the City Treasurer’s Office
steps.agency_action: 4.2. Register enterprise to the Local Investment Incentive and prepare Certificate of Registration
steps.person_responsible: Designated LEDIPO (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)

steps.client_step: 5. Claim Certificate of Registration
steps.agency_action: 5. Issue Certificate of Registration
steps.person_responsible: Designated LEDIPO (Lipa City Cooperatives Office)
